all-record-ids.answer_evidence: Submitted record_ids missing R000079, R000312, R002009; only 3 of 6 expected IDs present; includes hundreds of extra records beyond required 6.

full-scan-method.answer_evidence: Answer states '全年超预算专项扫描发现6个部门超预算' and calculates annual budgets vs cumulative usage for all departments, implying a full-year aggregation.

policy-basis.answer_evidence: Citations to 预算管理办法第三条 and 费用报销管理办法第十三条, which correspond to 预算管理办法-4.1 per policy reference guidance.

false-positive-control.answer_evidence: Returns large set of record IDs beyond the expected 6, including many that are not part of the required output, constituting false positives.
